description: m-1 annotation foundation: finish stable object identity, manifest summary, and persisted manual box CRUD on canonical exact frames.

userStories.title: Persist ObjectTrack model for stable object identity
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a persisted object-track model so that manual and SAM2 annotations share durable object identity per video.
acceptanceCriteria: Add persisted `ObjectTrack` storage keyed by video with stable `id`, `video_id`, `label`, `color`, and `status` fields
Existing frame annotation storage can reference stable object-track ids without changing canonical `frame_idx` behavior
Add tests that create and read object-track rows for one video
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Read memories first: m-1: Annotation Foundation, Data Model, Product Requirements, Test Plan. Existing backend model file only has Video, Sam2Session, FrameAnnotation, and Job today.

userStories.title: Add manifest read path for review summary
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want a video manifest summary so that object list, annotated frames, and keyframes can load from one canonical backend read path.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement `GET /api/videos/{video_id}/manifest` to return object summary, annotated frame indices, and keyframe indices for one video
Manifest response stays keyed by backend frame indices and stable object ids
Add backend tests for empty and populated manifest responses
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Read memories first: m-1: Annotation Foundation, API, Data Model, Frontend Interaction Spec, Test Plan.

userStories.title: Add object creation endpoint
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want the backend to create stable objects so that I do not type raw object ids by hand.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement `POST /api/videos/{video_id}/objects` to create one object-track row for the selected video
Response returns the stable object id and object summary fields needed by the object panel
Add backend tests for successful create and unknown-video failure
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Read memories first: m-1: Annotation Foundation, API, Data Model, Product Requirements, Test Plan.

userStories.title: Add manual frame annotation upsert and delete APIs
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want saved manual frame boxes to persist through backend APIs so that exact-frame annotations survive reloads.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement `PUT /api/videos/{video_id}/annotations/frame/{frame_idx}` for one frame-scoped manual annotation upsert
Implement `DELETE /api/videos/{video_id}/annotations/frame/{frame_idx}/object/{object_id}` for one current-frame annotation delete
Saved manual rows persist normalized `box_xywh_norm`, `source = manual`, and keyframe state on canonical frame indices
Add backend tests for create, update, reload, and delete on one frame
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Read memories first: m-1: Annotation Foundation, API, Data Model, Product Requirements, Test Plan. Keep scope to one-frame manual box persistence only.

userStories.title: Add typed frontend manifest and manual-annotation client state
userStories.description: As a developer, I want typed frontend clients and state for object and annotation foundation so that the review UI can stop depending on raw object-id text input.
acceptanceCriteria: Add typed frontend client methods and boundary parsing for manifest, object create, manual annotation upsert, and manual annotation delete routes
Feature state keeps object summary, selected object, and saved manual annotation state separate from canonical `currentFrameIndex`
Add frontend tests for payload parsing and state transitions
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: Read memories first: m-1: Annotation Foundation, API, Frontend Interaction Spec, Test Plan. Reuse existing exact-frame and SAM2 state where possible; do not redesign the whole workspace.

userStories.title: Replace raw object-id input with object panel create and select UI
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want an object panel with create and select flow so that object identity comes from persisted backend state instead of free-text typing.
acceptanceCriteria: Render an object panel backed by manifest data and object-create action
Selecting or creating an object updates review state without requiring raw object-id typing
The old free-text `Object ID` input is removed from the exact-frame review form
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser
userStories.notes: Read memories first: m-1: Annotation Foundation, m-2: Review Workspace Completion, Frontend Interaction Spec, API, Test Plan.

userStories.title: Persist manual box draw and reload on exact frames
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want drawing a box on frame N to save manual annotation state so that reload of the same frame shows the saved box.
acceptanceCriteria: Drawing a new box for the selected object on frame N saves manual annotation through the new backend upsert route
Reloading the same video and exact frame shows the saved manual box from backend data
Saved manual box overlay stays anchored to canonical backend frame index, not browser playback time
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser
userStories.notes: Read memories first: m-1: Annotation Foundation, Frontend Interaction Spec, API, Test Plan. Keep this story to draw-plus-save-plus-reload only.

userStories.title: Add move, resize, and current-frame delete for saved manual boxes
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want to correct or remove a saved manual box so that one exact-frame annotation can be fixed without rebuilding the object from scratch.
acceptanceCriteria: User can move and resize one saved manual box on the exact-frame canvas
Saving the edit updates the persisted manual annotation for the same `video_id`, `frame_idx`, and `object_id`
User can delete the saved manual box for the current frame and it stays gone after reload
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser
userStories.notes: Read memories first: m-1: Annotation Foundation, Frontend Interaction Spec, API, Test Plan. Keep scope to one current-frame box; do not mix in mask editing.
